overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a desert highway shoulder at sunset in GTA V. Vehicles including trucks, cars, motorcycles, and buses pass by on the multi-lane road, with rocky hills and power transmission towers visible in the warm golden hour light.

events.description: large box truck passes by in the right lane
motorcycle with rider passes by quickly
yellow food truck with 'Chihuahua Hot Dogs' branding passes by

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt highway shoulder, moving forward in the same direction as traffic flow

notable_agents.action: large brown box truck driving past in the right lane
motorcyclist riding past quickly on the right

entered.detail: steep rocky hillside with sparse vegetation rising immediately beside the shoulder
steep rocky hillside with scattered trees silhouetted against the sunset
tall metal electricity pylons visible in the distance along the highway corridor
bright sun sitting low on the horizon behind the right hillside, creating golden hour backlighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway at golden hour, with the camera walking along the dirt shoulder. Rocky embankments flank both sides of the road while power towers stand in the hazy distance. Various vehicles including a box truck, motorcycle, and food truck pass by on the multi-lane asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with steady vehicle traffic

events.description: classic sedan with white roof passes by
black muscle car with chrome details passes by
semi-truck with blue cargo trailer passes by

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk steadily along the shoulder as the sun begins to dip lower

notable_agents.action: black classic muscle car driving past with engine visible
large semi-truck with blue trailer passing by slowly

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the highway shoulder with consistent rocky terrain on both sides. The power transmission towers gradually shift to the left as the camera advances. Traffic remains steady with a mix of classic cars, muscle cars, and large trucks passing by in the warm evening light.

events.description: white sports car passes by quickly
large white tour bus with blue stripes passes by
food truck passes by again in the opposite direction of earlier

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady pace along the shoulder as dusk approaches and traffic continues

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving past at high speed
large white tour bus with dark windows driving past

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the desert highway as the sun nears the horizon. A white sports car and large tour bus pass by, followed by the return of the food truck. The rocky embankments and power towers remain visible in the distance as the golden hour light persists.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a desert highway shoulder as the golden hour light deepens toward sunset. It begins with the camera advancing past rocky embankments and distant power towers while a box truck, motorcycle, and food truck speed by on the multi-lane asphalt. As the walk continues, the power transmission towers gradually shift toward the left of the frame, and the traffic evolves into a steady stream of classic muscle cars and large trucks. The scene then persists along the consistent rocky terrain as the sun nears the horizon, with a white sports car and a large tour bus passing by before the food truck reappears. Finally, the camera maintains its forward momentum through the warm evening haze, keeping the distant towers and rugged hills in view.
